name: jan-kapitalfluss
description: Approval-gated Commerzbank -> Kapitalflusstabelle + Liquiditätsplanung automation. Sorts every income and expense of one Commerzbank business account into the table by sign (account-wide, not per-store). Plans monthly writes from a CSV export, shows a change-overview live artifact, and writes into the existing Excel files ONLY after explicit approval. No auto-booking, no auto-send. GoBD-archived.
